review_title: Re: Review on Push Operations Payroll Feature
description: I am a one man show and Push Operations' Payroll Feature has enabled me to spend my limited time on being an effective leader focusing on the operations for the furtherance of the company rather than doing daily tasks to stay intact.
author: Rick K.
pros: Automated stat pay calculations, clock ins/outs, user empowered communication platform such as staff leaving special requests such as vacation pay, incorrect punch in/out notes, etc.
cons: I can't really pin point anything at this point but if I had to leave a feedback on its challenges are the development of its mobile apps to feature more wholesome and advanced usability for admin users.

review_title: Push Software
description: We use a third party to process payroll and use push to generate the information
author: Craig P.
pros: Ease of use for the staff plus accountability for time off an shift change requests.
cons: Some of the challenges handling administrators access.

review_title: Simple to use and the customer service takes the guess of out what I'm doing.
author: Samantha S.
pros: Simplicity overall. Easy to navigate and edit employee information. Very basic interface and it's not difficult to train others on how to use it.
cons: The lack of information around what-does-what. Always having to reach out for assistance from customer service reps.

review_title: Fantastic Product!
description: Excellent Product, Fantastic Support, Easy to Use, Professional & Concise
author: Paula M.
pros: The personal support and the emailed chat conversation that is provided after getting assistance. The reps are amazing!
cons: The "online manual" is not very helpful at all. That is definitely balanced out by the level/style of customer support provided though.

review_title: Good Service
author: Martin B.
pros: Easy to use and very convenient. Love the ability to login and adjust hours for our guys
cons: Sometimes it doesn't capture employees login.

review_title: Time Saving
author: Tara H.
pros: The ease of running payroll with this system saves so much time and stress.
cons: One very small issue is that when you are creating push messages if it times out your draft is not saved.

review_title: Push makes it easy!
description: Push takes care of our payroll so we can focus our efforts and energy on our top priority - providing exceptional service to those experiencing fertility struggles!
author: Jaclyn G.
pros: Push takes the reign on payroll so we don't have to worry about if things are correct or not, they get it right every time! It makes our company flow so much better and takes away a lot of anxiety and stress.
cons: Not necessarily a con, but when you submit a question to them you receive an auto e message saying they have received it. Getting another email, without the answer is not great, I would prefer to just wait for my answer.

review_title: Great software for keeping track of daily activities.
description: It helps the store fun effeciently as possible and presents itself very user friendly.
author: Anna H.
pros: It is very easy to use and navigate so that I can teach our newest recruits with no problem.
cons: The side icons can be a bit confusing as some of the wording is the same.

review_title: OUTSTANDING Do-It-Yourself Payroll and Scheduling Product! Goodby ADP and Ceridian!
author: Paul S.
pros: We moved from ADP and it was a night and day difference. The ease of running payroll and setting up a weekly schedule is hardly worth comparison. As well, the integration between timekeeping, scheduling, and running payroll makes services like ADP seem like complete dinosaurs. No need for a clunky time-clock - employees clock in and out on an iPad. Holidays are automatically calculated - Yay! I literally spend about 2 minutes to run payroll. Finally, submitting an ROE is as easy as clicking one button. Two major headaches removed from my workflow. This industry has been waiting a long time for a product like this. Don't think twice about moving to Push. Rid yourself of the pains of payroll and scheduling.
cons: Navigating user permissions and categories can be confusing at times. There have been a couple of times where I have had to contact customer support in order to locate a user permission.

review_title: Using push has saved me at least 10 hours per month with scheduling and payroll services.
author: Brad S.
pros: I love the web interface. It's clear and easy to use and makes running payroll a breeze. Scheduling is incredibly easy and allowing different users separate permissions has helped me a lot in terms of delegating certain tasks to different staff. I have referred many people to push, and I will continue to do so.
cons: I don't like that the website does not work very well from phone/tablets. I can't approve hours or shift changes unless I'm at a desktop/laptop. This is quite annoying and I hope that you can fix this issue in the coming months.

review_title: Payroll is not longer labour intensive for the accounting department
description: Free up labour intensive data entry and data transfer between various pages / spreadsheets/ programs. Free up time from payroll administrator to look up info for others, as all users have access to the info that they needed without the need to go through payroll department.
author: Kevin T.
pros: Transparency (managers and staff can check info themselves), Ease of approval between managers and accounting, and Smooth workflow from scheduling
cons: Mobile feature could improve to get close to full experience from the web, especially on the accounting side.

review_title: They have been great to work with.
author: Penny L.
pros: ease of use and the team at PUSH is very accommodating. When we request something they have their developers build it.
cons: There is nothing we do not like about this software The implementation and daily use are so easy !

review_title: Everything in one place and at my fingertips!
author: Sherri R.
pros: The program is user friendly, it simplifies everyday tasks, and reduces the risk of error. All the team member info I need is available in one place through reporting that I can customize to my needs.
cons: A few hiccups in functionality but the team at Push is quick (as in immediate!) to resolve any questions, issues, or concerns.

review_title: Very efficient and scales easily to meet my needs for the organization.
author: Gary K.
pros: Easy to manage team member information. We have grown our business by 3x over the course of the last 12 months, and this application has made payroll administration manageable.
cons: Multiple ways to do a few things, and that I have on occasion selected the wrong method to complete a task.

review_title: Push is very user friendly, and easy to navigate following the initial tutorial.
author: Brendon K.
pros: The ease of process payroll and adding earnings/deductions is the biggest draw for me, and is what pulled me away from Payworks to Push.
cons: I wish the total withdrawal amount would be available immediately after processing (including all the fees)
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Overall Happy
description: I am overall happy with our experience with Push Operations.
author: Melissa K.
pros: I liked that employee annual reviews could be stored on Push Operations and easily accessed,
cons: I don't really have anything negative to say. It is a pretty straight forward program.

review_title: Push operations review
description: very good, reliable, easy to implement and
author: Amir A.
pros: Push Operations: Efficient workforce management with real-time data & support.
cons: Push Operations has a steep learning curve initially

review_title: Takes away the stresses of payroll
description: The easiest payroll system ever! complimented by an amazing support team. It doesn't get any better than Push Operations for payroll
author: Jo B.
pros: this is the easiest payroll system I have ever used! It is easy to maneuver your way around the system and it is so quick to complete. I have never been able to complete payroll faster than this system. This frees me up for getting on with other work. The support team are amazing! They are always so very helpful and courteous
cons: This is a tough question as it is very hard to find something that I dislike. If I really had to think of something I guess it would be that if I complete an offrun and there has been a stat day, I have to remember to make that calculation and add it to the run
author_profession: Manager of Human Resources and Administration

review_title: Making Payroll Easy
description: PUSH has afforded us a level of transparency allowing us to drill down and understand exactly where our labour dollars are being spent; by the department, position, employee, and even the hour. By using PUSH, we have streamlined our payroll processing allowing us to reduce not only the time it takes to run a payroll but also our overall labour costs.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The software is straight forward and easy to learn. It has allowed us to better match staffing to demand and most importantly, control our labour costs. The support staff are friendly, responsive and very knowledgeable. They intuitively understand hourly labour in the hospitality sector.
cons: If PUSH could provide product updates faster it would be appreciated as there are a few areas for improvement with the software (i.e. employees cannot view timesheets on the time clock). But we are grateful for the platform they have developed and the support they continue to provide and are confident that their development team will have a solution within a few months.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple easy to use
author: Andrew C.
pros: It’s simple. For scheduling, budgeting labour, ensuring everyone’s clocked in and paid. I also train others to use the program and that is simple as well
cons: A few quality of life changes could be made. But nothing major enough that I can conjure it off the top of oh head

review_title: Review on Push Operations
author: Mike P.
pros: Very intuitive, very easy to use. Small business, so they listen to what you need, and if there are any issue
cons: Customer service can be a bit slow sometimes; but often it's because I want something that added to the program that doesn't already exist.

review_title: Best thing to come around for the restaurant industry
description: Our experience has been excellent very professional ad very helpful!
author: Clint T.
pros: Very easy to use and the scheduling made our lives easier!
cons: There isn't much we don't like! I would like to see if Push could talk to our POS company so our labour reports could work with our system!!

review_title: Push - scheduling
description: Overall, the experience has been above average. Guest experience is great.
author: teena S.
pros: My team uses the scheduling feature. This saves several hours, with the team adding in their own availability and admin using the information to schedule 2 -3 weeks out.
cons: If employees work in more than one class, under the same company, they don't get just 1 T4 but up to 6 of them. It's a hassle.

review_title: Good payroll software for our Restaurant.
author: Jippy T.
pros: I work at a small Thai restaurant and needed a good payroll software that was easy and fast and this one didn't disappoint. I tried a few others but this one worked well for our needs. I liked the interface and it was pretty intuitive as well. My manager and I have been using for a little while and would recommend.
cons: It could have a little more q&a page to answer questions when learning but the customer support was good as well. I would like to use more to fully understand.

review_title: Great product for small/medium company
description: Labor management, scheduling and time & attendance issues.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very user friendly, easy to setup, excellent customer service.
cons: Could use some more reporting for auditing. Does not interface with Quickbooks yet.
